review_title: It's robust and effective for blocking website attacks
description: Personally, I recommend it for WordPress websites because it works and can keep you from lots of risks. It's worth using.
author: Ferent L.
pros: Not having an anti-data phishing tool like WordFence today means you're vulnerable to making huge losses. This software is by far the best WordPress website security plugin that I've ever come across. I like it because it provides a lot of robust security options to fully enhance websites. From data beaching, website hacking, data phishing, and virus attacks, WordFence assures security. It's easy to use and provides various ways to completely prohibit website attacks like filtering IPs, brute-forcing, and Filtering by countries, and offers additional security grids for website administrators (2FA and backup codes). I also prefer it because it doesn't need a lot of time or data to do its job, once installed and set - it gets to work and trust me, it does its job perfectly.
cons: I would have loved to have CDN features released in the next versions of WordFence because although it works well for filtering malicious plugins, however, there could be instances where some latencies are introduced into the website during the filtering process or any other issues that could potentially affect the site's performance speeds - so if there is a CDN it can help to eliminate these. And secondly, I would love to use it in French language as It's my primary language and I'm most comfortable with it.
author_profession: Web Designer - Junior Platform Maintainance Engineer And Seasoned Online Marketing Assistant

review_title: The first plugin to get installed on every new site install
description: I recommend it since it offers peace of mind knowing the site has at least some protection. Even if it is the free version, I feel much better having it on there doing its thing.
author: Jeremy A.
pros: I love how the free version offers enough protection for simple sites. I like having the login alerts notify me when others log in to the site. The feature to add usernames to a blacklist that will automatically lock out the user when entered at login is great too. Another great feature is the Wordfence Central feature, which lets you connect your account to Wordfence, it will list all of your connected sites in a central dashboard on their site to make managing all of your sites so easy and fast. That is my favorite feature.
cons: I don't like how it has a notification icon next to the name in the dashboard menu for useless notifications. Especially when it is a notification for the ToS documents that appear every couple of weeks. That is really annoying to me but I'm the type of person that doesn't like extra notifications cluttering up my dashboard.

review_title: a bit complex
description: It was okay but I had some conflicts with the plugin and my hosting service.
author: Vanessa A.
pros: It offers some good features for site security. I liked that it allowed you to customize your security settings even with the free plugin. You can also have login notices emailed to you as well.
cons: I found the software dashboard to be a bit confusing. I also had an issue with scans. It seemed to be too heavy for my hosting service to handle.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wordfence review
description: Wordfence is the best WP site security plugin we've tried out so far gone. It's our number one recommendation.
author: Joël T.
pros: Wordfence is a must-have plugin if you really care about your Wp website security. It's ideal for small and mid-size businesses with a fairly large amount of data. This plugin helps to combat hackers and website hijackers from invading and compromising websites' login credentials.The brute-force option is the most effective one among all the rest that I've tested out so far and it's worth it. With this plugin, I can exclude undesired IP addresses from my traffic list and do even more. The plugin also comes at extremely low fees which is advantageous for even individual businesses.While there are many site security out there that claim to do the work, however, they are just trying- while Wordfence performs.
cons: Like any other plugin, Wordfence is not perfect- meaning that, It has its drawbacks. We often associate with other plugins to enhance the grids around the walls; this prevents robust hackers from coming in.

review_title: Wordfence Review
author: Chibuike U.
pros: As a website owner, I appreciate the many benefits of using Wordfence to protect my WordPress website. One of the main benefits of using Wordfence is its comprehensive security features. The plugin includes a range of tools and features that work together to provide a robust and effective security solution for my website.
cons: Wordfence is certainly a great option when it comes to protecting WordPress websites, however, there are some potential drawbacks. It may be quite resource-intensive, especially on websites that receive a lot of traffic, or those that have many plugins and custom code. This can cause slow load times and overall performance issues for the website.

review_title: Excellent Free Model Tier for Small Businesses
description: I am very happy with Wordfence, and many developers who make website from small sole traders and businesses use the Free Plan and have no complaints. You need to set it up from a check sheet from someone reputable so you have the best security.
author: Proinsias M.
pros: It had a very generous free tier which is important for a small business There was a lot of features that to be honest were worth paying for. I started to watch the weekly Video Call and I learnt a lot about security from those calls. I also did get the quiz right one week and I won some nice SWAG as it is referred to in the call I could switch off functions based on conflicts and general advice If there is a Critical Threath they will let you know even if you are on the free plan
cons: I had to wait 4 weeks before learning about any major threats as I was not a paid member There was talk about it bloating my wordpress site, but to be honest I could not prove that. I upgraded by Hosting and Caching plugins and it was nothing to be worried about. There is a learning curve and I did rely on online help is setting up the configuration initially, and I was unsure if that advice was credible. But it worked well for me.

review_title: WordFence
description: It helps me to gird my website with advanced security technology and overall, it gives a peace of mind. I highly recommend it.
author: Romaric S.
pros: This is the only security plugin I use on all of my websites( including client projects) and It has never let me down before.The workforce security plugin for WordPress is the best measure you can take to bypass web attacks. It's very reactive to internet threads and ensures 100% website security.The plugin is quite affordable and licenses can be used for unlimited purposes.
cons: I haven't noticed anything bad about wordfence.

review_title: Wordfence to the rescue
description: Overall, Wordfence is a life-saver that prevents all unauthorized accesses and potential threats and keep your website safe.
author: Fahadh N.
pros: I'm developing websites using Wordpress for the past 14 years. Since the past couple of years, hack attempts have increased by many folds. Wordfence has been installed on dozens of my websites and it always has been a life-safe. Specially with the in-built firewall rules, Wordfence ensures that unauthorized access to your site is completed blocked. With more blacklisting and whitelisting options - it gives more control over to who can access and who cannot. The premium version has a powerful Web Application Firewall (WAF) that acts as the frontline of the website that blocks potential threats that comes to your website.
cons: The software can further improve. Particularly, a little bit more features added to it would make the plugin more irreplaceable. For example, file management security, database management security, more bruteforce relation hardening options (custom wp login url etc.) etc. can be added to increase more security.

review_title: The best WordPress security plugin I've ever used during the last 6 years
description: It has a powerful scan feature that allows us to remove salacious codes, and it also has a user-friendly section for specifying the suspicious users login attempts.
author: Ahmed Samy E.
pros: Wordfence helped my team to detect a harmful malicious code that has been injected in our WordPress website. I also should mention its powerful login security feature that always protect our website against the daily suspicious login attempts.
cons: I think Wordfence should develop the notification criteria of its scan feature to report only the serious threatening changes that occur to the website, as the non-tech users like me may feel confused when seeing a notification about unknown files and don't know if they should be removed or not.

review_title: Wordfence is the first plugin I install
description: I love Wordfence. I want it to be cheaper, but I love it.
author: PAUL O.
pros: We have large and small clients. Each client seems to have the same likelihood of being attacked as they have a WordPress website. Wordfence is on the forefront of security. They are constantly publishing reports on what the latest vulnerabilities are. They are protecting 1000s of sites from attack and it seems like they are getting better and better at blocking the attacks. We bundle the protection into our management fees as this makes the customer more protected than they would be without it.
cons: The price. It is very expensive. As an agency, it would be great to be able to buy in bulk and pass on the savings to the smaller clients we host. Even with the 25% discount when we buy more than 15 licenses, it is still expensive for the smaller clients.

review_title: The Best Wordpress Security Software
description: I can now relax when I am notified about hackers who try to break into my website or try to get my username. The software initially helped me to clean up my root files that were infected from backdoor entry malware. Now all I have to do is view my daily or regular scans to make sure that my files are clean. I used to waste so much time trying to fix my sites when I have more than one.
author: Margaret L.
pros: Since I began using Wordfence, I haven't had my website hacked! I lost two websites to hacking until I discovered Wordfence. It's a must have security software when using Wordpress which gets hacked easily.
cons: It's expensive, even for use with one website.

review_title: No need to become a security expert yourself; just use Wordfence
description: Overall, Wordfence handles security so I can do other things instead. I'd rather work on marketing and website content, and my clients would rather pay me to do that too to grow their businesses.
author: Ann A.
pros: Wordfence is the first plugin I install on a site, instantly after installing WordPress. Wordfence has long been one of the top 2 or 3 WordPress security plugins when it comes to covering all bases to keep sites protected. Before Wordfence I spent hours trying to learn all the settings and best practices to protect a site, while trying to figure out which articles, classes, videos and webinars were legit and which were obsolete already or full of misinformation. Eventually I figured out that Wordfence automates all that. And their team is extremely diligent in adding to the product as new security risks and vulnerabilities emerge on the web, as well as working with individual plugin and theme developers to alert them of new issues and get them resolved. Now I don't have to try to be a security expert. The backbone of my website security strategy is Wordfence, plus a hosting company that is strong on server-side security - plus standard best practices like choosing complex passwords and managing a solid, redundant backup process. Something else I like a lot is the real-time email alerts from Wordfence when a new vulnerability is discovered with a WordPress plugin or theme or Wordpress itself - I can glance at the email to see if it's software I'm using on any of my sites, and if it is, follow Wordfence's instructions to update the software to a new version that contains a fix for that vulnerability.
cons: I have a few sites where the Wordfence firewall is only 85% installed. There's one more step to optimize the firewall. But when I try, it fails. For this step there are several hosting server settings to try if the first setting fails, and you have to wait a couple days after each try to see if it worked. I've started the process twice, then lost track. I wish it could detect my hosting server settings automatically instead of just saying it's taking its best guess. Now I have to start over once again to document it so that I can open a support ticket if all the options fail.

review_title: Great security product for your WordPress site at minimal cost that helps you breathe easy
description: Generally, I would highly recommend the product. For organisations that hold higher risk, you may want to ensure someone is fully trained on all the features, but for small organisations with limited capacity, its a great solution that makes your life much easier.
author: Lauren G.
pros: Once installed, the software is very easy to use and monitor. It gives you peace of mind that your website is protected from external attacks and the alerts will always notify you if something unusual is taking place. If you need to interrogate traffic further it is simple to do so and it is possible to add rules to create an extra security level which has helped us prevent bot attacks through our donation/payment system.
cons: Sometimes I struggle to locate the pages I am looking for when interrogating IP addresses and monitoring traffic to the site. This is maybe because I only have to use the software occasionally because the standard security it provides is sufficient for our charity website.

review_title: Essential defence for any Wordpress website!
description: Wordfence is an extra line of defence for any Wordpress site and gives us administrator a little extra piece of mind when it comes to securing our websites.
author: Olaf S.
pros: We use Wordfence on all our websites. It is the first plugin we install. Its setup is automatic and simple. The web application firewall configures itself quickly and starts working immediately. Customisation is plentiful up to the point where you can specify lockout periods for irregular users and login attempts, as well as IP and geo-blocking features.
cons: Some of the options are difficult to find initially so it requires a bit of time to familiarise yourself with all the features, and where to configure them in detail.

review_title: Wordfence is a must
description: My overall experience is I feel more secure knowing that I am running wordfence on my wordpress websites. It was very easy to install and set up, which is a huge plus. The program also automatically sends emails to notify me of any log ins or log in attempts. This helps with my sense of security. I have been using it for several years with great success.
author: Kathy P.
pros: What I like most about Wordfence is the ability to easily install it and even at the default settings it is ready to protect your wordpress website. There are many options that can be set to suit your own needs. The best part, for me, is the ability to block an IP permanently. With the paid version you can block a country.
cons: I do wish the plug in offered a permanent block on an IP automatically, or even a year, but to do that you must log into your website and do it manually. 2 months is the longest they offer.

review_title: Cost-Effective Option for Additional Website Security
author: Richard B.
pros: Wordfence is great for detecting malware, blocking IP addresses and for additional firewall protection.
cons: It's not a perfect solution and you have to pay $100 per year for full protection. I had to have additional measures through my web provider including another firewall to fully protect my site

review_title: Wordfence review
description: I've been using this tool for about 4 months and find it to be very efficient. I highly recommend it for site security. You don't want to wake up on a good morning to discover that your website has crashed or been pirated. Give it a shot; you'll love it.
author: jason E.
pros: I'm not endorsing this tool in any way; my review is simply based on my acknowledgments and experience with it. Excellent website security tool. This tool, similar to a firewall, adds an extra layer of security to help prevent malware attacks. It's a free tool that any website owner can install and use to protect their site's quality. . It includes a website hack recovery feature, which is extremely useful if you need to recover a hacked website. This tool keeps track of all the activities that take place on my website on a daily basis.- It sends email alerts to my inbox whenever it detects any unusual activity on my website. .This tool has a 4.7/5 stars rating on WordPress with thousands of installations.
cons: No cons. I just love how this tool works.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wordfence
author: Brandi A.
pros: I like the scanner for vulnerabilities the most. It gives real-time info on anything making your site vulnerable.
cons: I don't think there is anything I don't like about the product. Maybe the cost is a little high otherwise its great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Even the free version saves us headaches
description: We absolutely love this software for guarding our site, it has definitely alerted us to some dangers and activities we would not have other wise been aware of.
author: Alexis C.
pros: We use the free version and I love the immediate reports of suspicious activity on the site. From the dashboard we can easily see where and wen we are most under attack.
cons: I really have no complaints, there's a purchase up option however the free option in and of itself is amazing.

review_title: A go-to security service
description: WordFence is my go-to security plugin for Wordpress websites and I've used it many times.
author: Sherwin F.
pros: Many do the features are free to use. The service also uses crowdsourcing to detect security issues.
cons: Some of the more advanced features require a subscription

review_title: Best Free Security Plugin for Wordpress
description: Excellent security plugin for websites.
author: Shaikat R.
pros: As a content marketer, securing my websites from unwanted attacks is vital, and Wordfence does that well. It's a very straightforward plugin, and the free version is all you need to protect your WordPress websites. The setup process is simple and easy. If anything suspicious happens to the website, Wordfence emails you about it, which is a great feature.
cons: As a free user, I don't have anything to complain about Wordfence.

review_title: Excellent web-application Firewall
description: Wordfence stops any potential cyber attack in our website and we feel secure!
author: Zinonas A.
pros: I'm using Wordfence plugin in the company's website and we are more than happy about the security of the website! We get a report in our email about any attacks that were successfully stopped!
cons: There is nothing that we like least about the software. We are using the free version of the plugin and we are very satisfied!

review_title: WordFence Protects My Site Like No Other
description: I love that my website is safe from unscrupulous people trying to derail my hard work in maintaining an online presence.
author: Kim M.
pros: I can't be bothered with hackers trying to infiltrate my site and WordFence stops them in their tracks.
cons: There's really nothing to dislike about a tool that keeps your website safe and protected without needing you to do anything.

review_title: Very happy with this software, great website protection
description: I am very happy with this plugin I have had zero issues
author: Helena B.
pros: I love that is fairly easy to use plugin, I didn't have to take too long to set up and it's been doing a great job of protecting my site
cons: I think maybe a bit difficult to understand some of their features and settings after you are set up

review_title: High site security
author: Jo B.
pros: It's very easy to set up and the email notifications are really handy to keep an eye on site security
cons: Premium is a little pricey but worth the peace of mind
